title: Render pages as Bot API 10.1 rich messages
description: Replace the monospace <pre> TUI with rich HTML (headings, tables, blockquotes, details) sent via sendRichMessage / editMessageText rich_message.

title: CLI issue write commands (add/move/done/assign/archive)
description: Atomic, validated writes to issues.json so a human or agent can mutate the board without editing JSON by hand.

title: render --json for agents
description: Emit board state (progress + active issues) as JSON so agents consume structure instead of parsing the TUI.

title: Sync RU docs and add CI issue smoke test
description: Mirror the rich-message + CLI changes into docs/ru and guard the write path in CI.

title: Fix gitleaks CI on pull requests
description: Full-depth checkout (fetch-depth: 0) so gitleaks can scan the commit range instead of failing on an unknown parent revision.

title: Verify live rich-message send against a Bot API 10.1 client
description: Drive sync/run with a real bot token and chat, confirm the pinned message renders tables/headings and inline navigation edits the same message.

title: Plain-text fallback for clients older than Bot API 10.1
description: Optional: fall back to a plain sendMessage if rich_message is unsupported. Add only if rich proves flaky in the field.

title: Dogfood: track OpenLinear on OpenLinear
description: Ship a real dataset describing this project's own board so render/sync/run can be tested against live data.

title: Cache tracker reload in the run loop
description: run reloads all JSON on every update. Fine at current scale; add an mtime cache only if data grows.

title: Refresh architecture and pipeline docs for rich rendering
description: docs/architecture.md and docs/pipeline.md still assume the monospace renderer.
